creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think this is worth keeping open for now.

Portupgrade is wrong in many ways when it comes to handling dependencies right. It passes off too much of the control to ports resulting in situations such as this and https://github.com/freebsd/portupgrade/issues/30 and making fixing https://github.com/freebsd/portupgrade/issues/58 difficult. As I noted before it is also quite wrong to not recursively upgrade by default as often it is expected by ports that a dependencies are updated first.
